home.title: Turning the browser into a playground.
home.description: Three frontend tools grown from real needs: a two-player drawing game, peer-to-peer transfer, and smarter short links with image pages.

drop.title: Web AirDrop
drop.description: Join a room and exchange text and files instantly with WebRTC.

links.title: Short Links & Thumbnails
links.description: Create short links, QR codes, and password-protected image share pages.

draw.title: Draw & Guess
draw.description: Scan a QR code, join a room, and sync drawings, guesses, and turn swaps in real time.

drop.title: Files take the direct route.
drop.description: Create a temporary room and let another device scan to join. Text and files move peer-to-peer over WebRTC; the server only helps both sides find each other.
drop.qrAlt: QR Code for joining the transfer room
drop.privacyHint: Files only live in the two browsers' memory and are never uploaded to this site. Maximum file size: 50 MB.
drop.networkHint: If pairing keeps failing, turn off iCloud Private Relay, VPN, or proxy and try again.
drop.empty: Send text or files here after connecting

status.full: This room already has two devices. Please create a new transfer room.

links.title: One link, easier to share.
links.description: Create short links and QR codes, or upload images as password-protected share pages.

placeholders.password: Leave empty to let anyone open it

hints.imageTypes: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF. Maximum size: 5 MB.

preview.imageDescription: After creating the image share page, you can protect it with a password.
preview.noDescription: This page does not provide a description.

empty.title: Preview appears here
empty.description: Short links show a default card. Image shares show the uploaded image.

image.refreshNote: Refreshing the page will ask for the password again.
image.protectedDescription: Enter the password and the image will appear on this page.
image.expiredDescription: This image share page existed before, but its expiration time has passed.
image.notFoundDescription: This image link does not exist, or the code was typed incorrectly.

errors.wrongPassword: Password is incorrect. Please try again.

notFound.title: There is no page here.
notFound.message: The URL may be mistyped, or this experiment entry has moved.

error.title: This page is temporarily unavailable.
error.message: Something did not finish correctly. Please try again later.

errors.ALIAS_TAKEN: This custom code is already in use. Try another one.
errors.CREATE_LINK_FAILED: Could not create the short link. Please try again.
errors.IMAGE_REQUIRED: Please choose an image to upload.
errors.IMAGE_TOO_LARGE: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.
errors.IMAGE_UPLOAD_FAILED: Image upload failed. Try another image or try again later.
errors.INVALID_ALIAS: Custom code must be 3–24 characters and can only use letters, numbers, - or _.
errors.INVALID_IMAGE_TYPE: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF images are supported.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_LONG: Password can be at most 16 characters.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 4 characters.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: You are creating links too quickly. Please try again later.
errors.REQUEST_TOO_LARGE: Upload is too large. Please choose an image under 5 MB.
errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_URL_PROTOCOL: Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs are supported.

placeholder.dropDescription: The next phase will add peer-to-peer text and file transfer with WebRTC.
placeholder.linksDescription: Supabase is wired up. Next comes the short-link schema, redirects, and thumbnail pipeline.

draw.title: Draw it. Guess it. Swap turns.
draw.description: Create a room on one device and scan the QR code on another. Strokes, guesses, skips, and turn swaps stay synced in real time.
draw.scan: Scan to join the drawing room
draw.desktopHint: Keep this page open as one side of the game
draw.networkHint: If pairing keeps failing, turn off iCloud Private Relay, VPN, or proxy and try again.
draw.techStack: WebSocket · QR pairing · Canvas · Reconnect · Realtime game state

player.title: Draw & Guess
player.leaveOpen: Keep this page open while playing
player.roomFullDescription: This drawing room already has two devices. Go back and create a new QR code.

game.drawerHint: Draw the prompt without typing the answer.
game.guesserHint: Look at the drawing and type your answer.
game.waitingForPeer: Waiting for the other player to join.
game.ruleHint: Correct guesses or skips automatically clear the board and swap turns.
game.peerSkippedResult: The other player skipped. The answer was {answer}.
